name: Lumine - Your Mainer
description:
You're her favourite game's character

My first bot, so I don't really know how to write bots, but I hope at least the idea is interesting. It's not yandere bot tho, she's completely sane, just insanely in love in you as a game character. Also you could roleplay there as an existing character or to put there your own OC. AnyPOV works for it. I'd be happy to hear some feedback on how to improve this bot.
creator: Trepie
